message:
feat(extensions): ext_onboarding_queue binary for de-biased candidate ranking

Add src/bin/ext_onboarding_queue.rs (642 lines) — a standalone binary
that reads the 1000-candidate extension-candidate-pool.json and produces
a de-biased onboarding queue (JSON + Markdown). Uses clap for CLI args,
reads from CandidatePool, and applies Pi-relevance scoring that penalizes
shared-repo popularity inflation (e.g., openclaw forks). Tracked by
bd-3sxyz.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
